resources.string: %1$d min session. Tap Stop or Continue.
Soft reminders before a likely feeding time
Around %1$s (in %2$d min). Estimated from recent feeds.
Reminders during this time are skipped.
Consider starting the next nap soon
Soft reminders before a likely sleep window
Around %1$s (in %2$d min). Estimated from recent sleep.
Notify before next likely sleep window
Daily reminder when milk bags are expiring
When your partner logs a bottle that uses milk from the stash
Partner used %1$d mL from the stash
When your partner starts, stops, or edits a sleep session
Sleep sessions you and your partner log will appear here.
Feeding side, elapsed feed time, and current sleep status
Milk stash — volume and bag count
Last feeding started %1$s ago; last side used %2$s
Start or stop a feeding session
Start or stop a sleep session
Couldn\'t save this change. Try again.
Time can\'t be in the future
Changes you log will appear here
Bottle feeds and breastfeeding sessions will appear here
This bottle feed will be removed. This cannot be undone.
Breastfeeding, session active. Open feeding screen.
Sleep, session active. Open sleep screen.
Pumping, session active. Open pumping screen.

plurals.name: home_inventory_content_description
plurals.item: Milk inventory, %1$d bag, %2$s. Open inventory screen.
Milk inventory, %1$d bags, %2$s. Open inventory screen.

resources.string: Milk inventory, no bags stored. Open inventory screen.
Log a bottle feed. Open bottle feed screen.
Trends. Open feeding and sleep charts.
Feeding history. %1$s. Open combined feeding history.
Try %1$s breast next, used less last session.
Connect to see shared baby data
Partner View. Connect to see shared baby data.
Likely hungry now, about %1$d minutes ago
Likely hungry around %1$s, in about %2$d minutes
Session will be saved to history.
Pick different start and end times to save this feed.
Sessions you track will appear here
Last sleep. No sleep logged yet.
Tap below to log a past sleep
Pick different start and end times to save this sleep.
Sleep sessions you track will appear here
Complete onboarding to generate a schedule
We\'ll remind you this many minutes after a nap ends.
Learning your baby\'s patterns. %1$d of %2$d sleep sessions recorded.
Watch for cues — the window may open soon
Watching baby\'s cues — no fixed window right now
Feeding now — sleep window appears after feed ends
Next sleep around %1$s. Open sleep screen.
Sleep prediction: still learning patterns. Open sleep screen.
Sleep prediction: watch for cues. Open sleep screen.
Baby is sleeping. Open sleep screen.
Sleep prediction: cue-led. Open sleep screen.
Sleep prediction: window appears after feed. Open sleep screen.
Not enough data yet. Keep tracking.
Feeds per day. Total %1$d over %2$d days.
Sleep hours per day, night and nap stacked, over %1$d days.
Average hours between feeds per day over %1$d days.
Track a few feeds and sleeps, and your baby\'s daily rhythm will appear here.
Daily rhythm over %1$d days, each row a day from midnight to midnight. Bars are sleep, dots are feeds.
A calm place to track feeds, sleep, and allergy notes during the first year.
Primary actions stay large and reachable.
Core baby data stays on this device.
Share a read-only snapshot when you choose.
This helps keep ages and records clear across feeding and sleep history.
Used to show growth percentiles against WHO charts. You can change this later.
Akachan is designed for babies 0-12 months.
Add only allergies you already know about for %1$s. If nothing is known yet, keep this empty and update it later.
Keeps allergy notes empty for now.
No allergies will be saved yet.
What should we call your baby?
A nickname is fine — you can change it anytime in Settings.
This keeps ages and records accurate across every tracker.
Add a due date so ages adjust for prematurity.
Is %1$s a boy or a girl?
What would you like to track?
Everything\'s on to start. Turn off anything you do not need — you can change this later in Settings.
Everything\'s ready. You can fine-tune trackers, allergies, and more in Settings.
Akachan can share a read-only snapshot of your baby\'s day with your partner. Turn it on anytime in Settings.
This removes %1$s from your baby\'s history. This can\'t be undone.
Log your baby\'s first measurement to see it on the WHO percentile chart.
WHO growth curves are sex-specific. Set your baby\'s sex to compare against them.
Tap + to capture your baby\'s first moment: a smile, a giggle, a first step.
This moment and any photo will be permanently deleted. You can\'t undo this.
Couldn\'t add that photo. Try another one.
Used to show growth percentiles against the WHO charts.
Your last import may be incomplete. Re-import your backup to finish.
Choose the date range to include
Set to 0 to disable the limit.
Check for new versions on launch
Show progress bars and quick actions on notifications
Notify me when my partner logs a bottle that uses milk from the stash
Open in Excel, Numbers, or Sheets
Merge records from a JSON backup file
Flag stored milk before it reaches the limit
Send a daily reminder for milk expiring today
No bags in your stash yet
Tap + to add a bag manually
Optionally record how much you pumped.
Store this milk in your inventory.
This will disconnect all connected partners.
This will disconnect all current partners. They\'ll need the new code to reconnect.
Share read-only access to your baby\'s data with a partner. They\'ll see feeding sessions, sleep records, and baby info.
Share this code with your partner
Enter the code shared by your partner
Ask the primary parent to open Partner Sharing in their app settings.
Ask the primary parent for a new sharing code to reconnect.
No active feeding or sleep was shared. Nothing needs attention.
Estimate from the last shared update
Stale shared data warning. This read-only view may be behind. Ask the primary parent to open Akachan if something is missing.
This read-only view may be behind. Ask the primary parent to open Akachan if something is missing.
Completed feedings from the primary device will appear here.
The latest nap or night sleep will appear after the next sync.
Allergy notes from the primary device will appear here.
When the primary parent tracks %1$s, shared feedings and sleep will appear here.
When the primary parent tracks a feeding or sleep, it will appear here.
Less than 1 week old, read-only partner view
Sleep window appears after this feed ends
Not enough logged data yet for a prediction
Too early for predictions. Watch for cues
sleep window passed, watch for sleepy cues
baby is sleeping, next window appears after wake
feeding now, sleep window appears after this feed ends
not enough logged data yet for a prediction
too early for predictions, watch for cues
Collection date cannot be in the future
Could not start session. Please try again.
Could not stop session. Please try again.
Could not save changes. Please try again.
Could not delete session. Please try again.
Couldn\'t load partners. Check your connection.
Couldn\'t enable sharing. Check your connection.
Couldn\'t stop sharing. Check your connection.
Couldn\'t generate new code. Check your connection.
Couldn\'t remove partner. Check your connection.
This code doesn\'t exist. Check with your partner.
We couldn\'t check for shared updates. Pull down to try again.
We couldn\'t check just now. Showing the last shared update.
Check your connection and try again.
Couldn\'t remove this feed. Try again.
Stop all active sessions before importing a backup.
Start cannot be in the future
End cannot be in the future
Start time can\'t be in the future
End time can\'t be in the future
End time must be after start time
Session is shorter than recorded pauses
Saved locally. Partner sync may update later.
No app available to share this code.
Use this code to connect to my baby tracker: %1$s
Could not save. Please try again.
Birth date cannot be in the future.
Due date can\'t be before the birth date.
This will merge into your current data:
Existing records are kept; duplicates are skipped. Milestone photos are not included in backups.
Your baby\'s sleep architecture is maturing from 2-stage to 4-stage cycles. This is a permanent and healthy change. Sleep may be more disrupted than usual.
Object permanence, separation anxiety, and motor milestones (crawling, pulling up) can temporarily disrupt sleep patterns.
Walking, early language development, and nap resistance may cause temporary sleep disruption.
Your baby may be ready to transition from %1$d to %2$d naps. They\'ve been averaging %3$s naps per day with good night sleep.
Fully personalized from your baby\'s nap history
Fully personalized from your baby\'s bedtime history
Blended from age-based expectations (%1$d%% personalized from your baby\'s nap history)
Blended from age-based expectations (%1$d%% personalized from your baby\'s bedtime history)
Using your baby\'s nap-specific wake patterns (%1$d intervals)
Using your baby\'s bedtime-specific wake patterns (%1$d intervals)
Using combined wake history (not enough nap-specific data yet)
Using combined wake history (not enough bedtime-specific data yet)
A sick, teething, or travel event in the last 48 h has reduced prediction confidence
Adjusted toward the expected bedtime circadian slot

plurals.name: sleep_reason_nap_deficit
plurals.item: Nap deficit: %1$d fewer nap than expected today
Nap deficit: %1$d fewer naps than expected today

resources.string: Sleep debt: 24h total vs. daily target suggests earlier window
Sleep debt: 24h total vs. daily target suggests later window
a breastfeed may be due near this window — offer a feed first if hunger cues appear
Always follow your baby\'s sleep cues — windows are estimates, not schedules.
Add a vaccine name to save.
Scheduled vaccines need a future date.
A given date can\'t be in the future.
Heads up: this date is in the future.
This permanently removes the record. You might need it for daycare or school later.
No rush. Mark it done when it happens, or reschedule.
Log a vaccine you\'ve given or schedule the next one. What\'s coming up shows here.
Reminds you before a scheduled vaccine
Get a notification before a scheduled vaccine
We\'ll notify you this many days before each scheduled vaccine.
We\'ll nudge you this many days before the target date to book the appointment.
No questions yet. Add one to ask at your next visit.
Couldn\'t create the summary. Try again.
Save the visit first to attach a summary
Add your next visit to see it here.
No visits yet. Add your first one to keep a record.
Reminders before an upcoming doctor visit
Get a notification before an upcoming visit
